title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Granules India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Granules India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Granules India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Granules India Advisory Limited:
Granules India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India Advisory Limited!
